back_translation: Finally, my brothers, rejoice in Lord Jesus. The fact that I write the same matter to you again is not a burden to me, but on the contrary it is a safeguard for you
Beware of those dogs; beware of evil workers; beware of the slashing-mutilation of the flesh
For we ourselves are the true circumcision — we are those who worship by the Spirit of God, who boast in Lord Jesus Christ, and who do not put trust in the flesh
Although I myself also have grounds to put trust in the flesh; if anyone thinks they have grounds to put trust in the flesh, I have grounds even more
Circumcised on the eighth day, of the race of Israel, of the tribe of Benjamin, a Hebrew descended from Hebrews, according to the law a Pharisee
According to zeal, I persecuted the church; according to righteousness which is in the law, I was without fault
But whatever things were profit to me, those things I consider as loss for the sake of Lord Christ

More than that, I consider all things as loss because of the overflowing value of knowing Lord Jesus Christ, the Lord of mine; for whom I have agreed to lose all things, and I consider those things as garbage, so that I may gain Lord Christ as profit

And so that I may be found dwelling in Him — not by having my own righteousness which comes from the law, but the righteousness which comes through faith in Lord Christ, the righteousness which comes from God on the basis of faith
So that I may know Him, and the power of His resurrection, and to share in His sufferings, by being one who is conformed to the same form as His death
So that I may attain to the rising from among those who are dead, by some way or another
Not that I have already received all of this, or am already a person who is fully complete, but I press forward in order to seize that which Lord Christ seized me for
Brothers and sisters, I do not consider that I have already seized it; but I do one thing — that is, forgetting the things that are behind and leaning my body forward
I press forward according to the goal, for the prize of the upward calling of God in Lord Jesus Christ
Therefore, let all of us who are mature in the spirit think this way; and if you think any matter differently, God will reveal this matter to you also
However, whatever we have already attained, walk according to that thing
Brothers, jointly imitate me, and observe those people who walk in life according to the example of us
For there are many people — whom I have told you often, and now I speak with tears — they walk in life as enemies to the cross of Lord Christ
The end of them is destruction; the god of them is the belly; the glory of them is in shameful things; they think only of matters of this world
But the status of being citizens of us is in heaven; from there, we wait with eager attention for the Savior, that is, Lord Jesus Christ, to come
He will transform the lowly body of ours, to have the same form as His glorious body, according to the power by which He is able to subdue all things under Him
